question.label: The real version
question.name: Tell me about your week — the real version.
question.description: Kim Scott's 'care personally' made concrete. Signals that a performed answer won't cut it.

assessment.note: [SHALLOW] 'its all good thanks' lacks specifics or engagement with the question.

new_queue.label: Clarify 'all good'
new_queue.name: When you say 'all good', what specifically went well this week? Any challenges or wins?

new_queue.label: Self-read opener
new_queue.name: Before I share my view, how do you think the last stretch has gone?

new_queue.label: What they're proud of
new_queue.name: What's something from the last quarter you're genuinely proud of — not what looks good, what actually was good?

new_queue.label: UX Design Impact
new_queue.name: How do you see your design work impacting our product goals this quarter?

new_queue.label: Design Quality Standards
new_queue.name: What specific steps have you taken to maintain high design quality and user experience?

new_queue.label: Collaboration Effectiveness
new_queue.name: Where do you see collaboration with product and engineering teams needing improvement?

new_queue.label: Stakeholder Feedback Loops
new_queue.name: How effectively do you think stakeholder feedback has been integrated into your designs?

new_queue.label: Leadership Growth Areas
new_queue.name: What specific leadership skills do you feel need the most development?

new_queue.label: Managing Design Stress
new_queue.name: How do you manage stress when balancing design quality and deadlines?

new_queue.label: Future Design Initiatives
new_queue.name: What design initiatives do you want to prioritize in the next quarter?
